text: నేను ఎల్ ఎల్ ఎం ఇన్‌ఫరెన్స్ గురించి నేర్చుకుంటున్నాను, అందుకే టోకెనైజేషన్‌ని పరిశీలిస్తున్నాను.

Large language model inference starts long before text generation. A tokenizer first converts raw text into smaller vocabulary units, and those token choices affect cost, context usage, and latency. Even when two models read the same sentence, their tokenizers may split code, punctuation, and multilingual text differently, which changes how much work the model needs to do.
